text.title: AI Code-Review Impact Suggestion Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Every leaf either applies a concrete rule or routes to `skip-this-methodology`.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the repo have a usable module graph + coverage report?

conclusion.verdict: skip — establish module graph / coverage first

branch.question: Is the PR trivial (docs / config typo)?

conclusion.verdict: produce impact comment with graph + coverage + hot-spot

example.trace: input matches `graph_available == true AND coverage_available == true` → sub-question → `pr_trivial == false` → conclusion ref=`module-graph-required`.
